name: Leuven (Belgium)

colors.symbolism: the historic colour of the city's coat of arms
the historic livery of the city

description: A horizontal bicolour of red over white in equal widths.
history: Leuven's red-and-white horizontal bicolour derives from the medieval colours of the Duchy of Brabant and has been used as the city's flag since the late Middle Ages.

features.symbolism: the historic colours of the city of Leuven, derived from the Duchy of Brabant
